root_text.an4.172:1.1: Tatra kho āyasmā sāriputto bhikkhū āmantesi:
root_text.an4.172:1.3: “Āvuso”ti kho te bhikkhū āyasmato sāriputtassa paccassosuṁ.
root_text.an4.172:2.1: “Addhamāsūpasampannena me, āvuso, atthapaṭisambhidā sacchikatā odhiso byañjanaso.
root_text.an4.172:2.2: Tamahaṁ anekapariyāyena ācikkhāmi desemi paññāpemi paṭṭhapemi vivarāmi vibhajāmi uttānīkaromi.
root_text.an4.172:2.3: Yassa kho panassa kaṅkhā vā vimati vā, so maṁ pañhena.
root_text.an4.172:2.4: Ahaṁ veyyākaraṇena sammukhībhūto no satthā yo no dhammānaṁ sukusalo.
root_text.an4.172:3.1: Addhamāsūpasampannena me, āvuso, dhammapaṭisambhidā sacchikatā odhiso byañjanaso.
root_text.an4.172:3.2: Tamahaṁ anekapariyāyena ācikkhāmi desemi paññāpemi paṭṭhapemi vivarāmi vibhajāmi uttānīkaromi.
root_text.an4.172:3.3: Yassa kho panassa kaṅkhā vā vimati vā, so maṁ pañhena.
root_text.an4.172:3.4: Ahaṁ veyyākaraṇena sammukhībhūto no satthā yo no dhammānaṁ sukusalo.
root_text.an4.172:4.1: Addhamāsūpasampannena me, āvuso, niruttipaṭisambhidā sacchikatā odhiso byañjanaso.
root_text.an4.172:4.2: Tamahaṁ anekapariyāyena ācikkhāmi desemi paññāpemi paṭṭhapemi vivarāmi vibhajāmi uttānīkaromi.
root_text.an4.172:4.3: Yassa kho panassa kaṅkhā vā vimati vā, so maṁ pañhena.
root_text.an4.172:4.4: Ahaṁ veyyākaraṇena sammukhībhūto no satthā yo no dhammānaṁ sukusalo.
root_text.an4.172:5.1: Addhamāsūpasampannena me, āvuso, paṭibhānapaṭisambhidā sacchikatā odhiso byañjanaso.
root_text.an4.172:5.2: Tamahaṁ anekapariyāyena ācikkhāmi desemi paññāpemi paṭṭhapemi vivarāmi vibhajāmi uttānīkaromi.
root_text.an4.172:5.3: Yassa kho panassa kaṅkhā vā vimati vā, so maṁ pañhena.
root_text.an4.172:5.4: Ahaṁ veyyākaraṇena sammukhībhūto no satthā yo no dhammānaṁ sukusalo”ti.

translation_text.an4.172:2.1: “Reverends, I realized the textual analysis of the meaning—piece by piece and expression by expression—a fortnight after I ordained.
translation_text.an4.172:2.2: In many ways I explain, teach, assert, establish, clarify, analyze, and reveal it.
translation_text.an4.172:2.3: Whoever has any doubt or uncertainty, let them ask me,
translation_text.an4.172:2.4: I will answer. Our teacher is present, he who is so very skilled in our teachings.
translation_text.an4.172:3.1: I realized the textual analysis of the text—piece by piece and expression by expression—a fortnight after I ordained. …
translation_text.an4.172:4.1: I realized the textual analysis of definition—piece by piece and expression by expression—a fortnight after I ordained. …
translation_text.an4.172:5.1: I realized the textual analysis of eloquence—piece by piece and expression by expression—a fortnight after I ordained.
translation_text.an4.172:5.2: In many ways I explain, teach, assert, establish, clarify, analyze, and reveal it.
translation_text.an4.172:5.3: If anyone has any doubt or uncertainty, let them ask me,
translation_text.an4.172:5.4: I will answer. Our teacher is present, he who is so very skilled in our teachings.”
